gt_sql: SELECT T2.date FROM circuits AS T1 INNER JOIN races AS T2 ON T2.circuitID = T1.circuitId WHERE T1.name = 'Brands Hatch' AND T2.name = 'British Grand Prix' ORDER BY T2.year DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql: SELECT r.date FROM circuits c JOIN races r ON c.circuitId = r.circuitId WHERE c.name = 'Brands Hatch' AND r.name = 'British Grand Prix' ORDER BY r.year DESC LIMIT 1
question: When was the last f1 season whereby Brands Hatch hosted the British Grand Prix?
